title: Senior Sales Engineer
description:
The position holder reports to Sales Manager/Senior SalesManager and must carry out the assigned duties and responsibilities and be able to work closely with other departments and other functional managers within the organization.

He/She MUST at all times maintain the confidentiality of all prices and plans and SHALL NOT disclose confidential information without the approval of her/his Manager.

Key Tasks:

1) Sales Functions

  • Achieve and excel against quarterly sales targets.
  • Prepare sales quotations and proposals based on technical specifications.
  • Follow up sales enquiries.
  • Build and maintain good dealer/customer relations with existing accounts.
  • Actively pursue new sales opportunities.
  • Grow sales in the assigned segment.
  • Monitor marketplace information and provide recommendations.
  • Regular customer/Dealer visits to position En-Syst as the preferred product/solution provider.
  • Provide appropriate technical support to customers, consultants, and prospects.

2) Administration and Operational Functions

  • Keep good records of documentation, including enquiry register log.
  • Provide monthly sales updates and reports.
  • Co-ordinate and lead meetings.
  • Prepare a sales work order and handle over to the project team.
  • Lead and execute improvement/new processes and customer service experience.
  • Ensure process conformance and local legislative compliance with appropriate standards and authorities.

3) Other Assignments

  • Shall carry out any project/task/work assigned by Immediate Manager, General Manager, and Directors as and when required to support the business.

Requirements

Education

  • Candidate must possess at least Diploma/Advanced/Higher/Graduate Diploma in Marine/Mechanical engineering

Knowledge / Experience / Others

  • Two to three years of marine inboard/outboard motor sales experience in Singapore or ASEAN region
  • Customer service and relations skills.
  • Adept at Microsoft Office and quickly pick up ERP software navigation skills.
  • Less or More experienced candidates are welcome to apply as well. A title and offer package commensurate with the credentials and experience of the successful candidate will apply, should they not fall within the stated range.

Personal Competencies

  • Shall have valid Singapore class 3 driving license.
  • Able to perform multi-tasking.
  • Independent, team player with good interpersonal skills.
  • Competitive and extroverted as the role is customer facing and requires winning people over.
  • Self-initiated to gather information about the market.
  • Proponent of embracing technology to improve the sales operations process than deferring back to ‘entry level’ solutions.

postedCompany.description:
EN-SYST EQUIPMENT & SERVICES PTE LTD

The Power Generation Professionals


We deliver power systems that leverage on next generation technology to drive efficiencies.


We design and supply customized power systems that support mission-critical infrastructure across various industries. For more than 30 years, we’ve been powering the industries and businesses that APAC relies on. With solutions ranging from 15 to 4,000 KVA, we’re primed for the present, and ready for the future.


We are a proud adopter of the Tripartite Standards. An initiative that distinguishes Singapore's progressive employer. We're committed towards building a better workplace for you with flexible work arrangements and age-friendly workplace practices.
postedCompany.name: EN-SYST EQUIPMENT & SERVICES PTE LTD
